name: gdg-multi-agent-ai
description: GDG Yerevan AI Multi-Agent & Session Memory Playground

scripts.build: npx -y -p typescript tsc src/static/app.ts --target es2017 --outDir src/static --allowJs --strict --esModuleInterop
scripts.dev: npx -y -p typescript tsc src/static/app.ts --target es2017 --outDir src/static --allowJs --strict --esModuleInterop --watch
